news.headline: Cryptocurrency prices remain stagnant as U.S. inflation eases. Analysts puzzled over why Bitcoin and altcoins have not rallied despite this.
news.summary: Analysts and traders have long anticipated that a decrease in inflation would boost the crypto market's performance. Despite this expectation, cryptocurrency prices continue to remain low. Cointelegraph provides insights into the reasons behind this phenomenon.

news.headline: Hong Kong plans to boost DeFi presence, as DAO allocates $37M for Julian Assange's cause in Finance Redefined.
news.summary: The Hong Kong government is looking to strengthen its position in the financial technology (fintech) sector by focusing on decentralized finance (DeFi) and the metaverse. Despite facing obstacles in the current environment, the government is determined to achieve this goal. Hong Kong plans to invest significant resources and expertise into these areas to establish itself as a leading force in DeFi and the metaverse. This strategic move is part of the government's broader plan to maintain its dominance in the fintech industry.

Goldman Sachs predicts a recovery for commercial real estate market with challenges ahead, after 8 quarters of declining transactions.
news.summary: A recent report from Goldman Sachs, shared by analyst Caitlin Burrows, suggests that the worst may be over for commercial real estate (CRE) assets but a full recovery is still distant. While the annual decline in CRE transaction volumes seems to have bottomed out, challenges remain for a widespread rebound. The comparison to the Global Financial Crisis shows that after eight quarters of decline, a positive shift occurred in the ninth quarter. Currently, CRE has experienced eight quarters of declines starting from Q3 2022. Some cities show exceptions to the overall trend. Leading indicators hint at a bottoming out of the CRE market. One positive sign is the OECD's U.S. Composite Business Confidence Index. Despite these positive indications, a full recovery for CRE assets is still a ways off.

news.headline: SLB wins contract for all-electric subsea project in Norway for 12-well system in Fram Sor field; focusing on electrification for production efficiency.
news.summary: SLB has secured a contract from Equinor ASA to complete the front-end engineering design ("FEED") for a groundbreaking all-electric subsea project in Norway. This initiative demonstrates a significant progression in subsea technology by emphasizing electrification for improved efficiency and production capabilities. The project will be managed by SLB OneSubsea, a collaborative effort between SLB, Aker Solutions, and Subsea7, headquartered in Oslo and Houston. Under the agreement, SLB will lead the FEED for a 12-well, all-electric subsea production systems endeavor situated in the Fram Sor field off the coast of Norway. Following the final investment decision, SLB OneSubsea will be directly appointed for the subsequent engineering, procurement, and construction phases. The Fram Sor project will employ SLB OneSubsea's standard subsea tree design, enhanced with a fully electrified power, control, and actuation system. By replacing high-pressure hydraulic systems with electric alternatives, operators will have the capability to expand exploration opportunities.

news.headline: Homewatch CareGivers in Colo. wins 3 Innovation Awards from Franchise Update Media for Total Care Solutions™️.
news.summary: Homewatch CareGivers, based in Greenwood Village, Colorado, has recently been recognized with three esteemed awards at Franchise Update Media's sixth annual Franchise Innovation Award contest. The awards highlight the company's innovative approach with Homewatch CareGivers Total Care Solutions™️. This announcement was made on June 28, 2024.

news.headline: Monday FX Option Expiries

Cryptocurrency prices dipped, Bitcoin at $60,719.49 (-1.7%), Ethereum at $3,378.62 (-2%), Dogecoin at $0.1237 (-0.8%). Positive year-end run expected by trader. Bolivia legalized Bitcoin after lifting decade-long ban. Bitcoin miners' selling pressure easing.
news.summary: Cryptocurrency markets have taken a downturn despite U.S. inflation remaining steady in May. Prices for major cryptocurrencies are as follows: Bitcoin (BTC) is at $60,719.49, down 1.7%; Ethereum (ETH) at $3,378.62, down 2%; Solana (SOL) at $141.47, down 4.8%; Dogecoin (DOGE) at $0.1237, down 0.8%; and Shiba Inu (SHIB) at $0.00001704, down 2.8%.Noteworthy statistics include a 74% increase in large transaction volume and a 13.8% rise in daily active addresses, with a significant 704.6% spike in exchanges netflows. Additionally, 35,808 traders were liquidated for $112 million in the past 24 hours, and Bitcoin withdrawals from miner-affiliated wallets dropped by 85% post-April halving. Bolivia legalized Bitcoin after a decade-long ban, allowing financial institutions to use cryptocurrency payments officially.In notable developments, a Bitcoin-powered core blockchain has launched an exchange-traded product in Sweden. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Income investors focus on dividends for consistent cash flow. Alexandria Real Estate Equities is a top dividend stock.
news.summary: Income investors prioritize consistent cash flow from their liquid investments, with dividends playing a critical role as a reliable source of income. Dividends are distributions of a company's earnings paid to shareholders, measured by dividend yield as a percentage of the current stock price. Research indicates dividends often contribute over one-third of total returns in the long run. Alexandria Real Estate Equities, headquartered in Pasadena, is spotlighted for its dividend performance. Investors seek high returns from various securities like stocks, bonds, and ETFs to maximize portfolio gains.

news.headline: Motorola launches VESTA NXT to enhance emergency response with AI, facilitating quick verification and analysis of 9-1-1 calls.
news.summary: Motorola Solutions, Inc. has launched VESTA NXT, an AI-enabled 9-1-1 software to help improve the efficiency of call handlers and dispatchers. The software addresses challenges faced by telecommunicators dealing with large amounts of information from varied sources that need quick analysis. It also tackles the issue of non-emergency calls diverting attention from critical emergencies. VESTA NXT offers features like call transcription, translation, and a virtual assistant for non-emergency calls. Available on cloud and on-premise, it provides a consistent user experience regardless of deployment. This software aims to enhance response times and streamline emergency services for better outcomes.

news.headline: Eni sells Nikaitchuq and Oooguruk assets to Hilcorp in Alaska. Enhanced production by 7,000 Bo/d. Strategic move for portfolio balance.
news.summary: Eni SpA has signed a binding agreement to sell its Nikaitchuq and Oooguruk upstream offshore assets in Alaska to Hilcorp. Eni held a 30% interest in Oooguruk field but later acquired the remaining stake. Eni's production capabilities in Alaska increased by 7,000 Bo/d due to this acquisition. Eni was already the operator with a 100% working interest in Nikaitchuq field. Their broader strategy includes generating a net portfolio inflow of €8 billion over 2024-2027 through divesting non-strategic assets.

news.headline: Market Street Memory Care Residence Palm Coast celebrates 6th year as a Great Place to Work® under Watercrest Senior Living.
news.summary: In Vero Beach, Florida, as of June 28, 2024, Market Street Memory Care Residence Palm Coast has been recognized as a Great Place to Work® for the sixth consecutive year. This certification comes under the operational management of Watercrest Senior Living. This prestigious designation highlights the commitment to excellence in providing quality care and services to residents.

news.headline: Garmin launches Edge 1050 smart cycling computer with improved battery life, navigation, and safety features. Aimed at enhancing cyclists' riding experience, it includes features like LiveTrack and Varia compatibility. Garmin aims to provide an advanced riding experience by offering road hazard alerts, in-ride messaging, and leaderboards during group rides. This launch expands Garmin's offerings for cyclists.
news.summary: Garmin has introduced the Edge 1050 smart cycling computer to enhance its fitness offerings. The device offers improved battery life, navigation, performance tracking, cycling awareness, and connectivity. It includes safety features like LiveTrack and incident detection, and is compatible with Varia cycling devices and inReach satellite communicators. The Edge 1050 provides road hazard alerts, in-ride messaging, and leaderboards for group rides. This move expands Garmin's offerings for cyclists and aims to enhance their riding experience. The company has been successful in the cycling market with products like the Edge 1040 Solar, featuring solar charging and multi-band GNSS technology. This new smart cycling computer is set to cater to the growing demand among cycle enthusiasts.

news.headline: Greenbrier Companies is a reliable dividend stock with high returns and steady cash flow for income investors.
news.summary: Generating significant returns from financial portfolios is the goal for many investors, whether it involves stocks, bonds, ETFs, or other securities. However, for income investors, the emphasis lies in creating a steady cash flow from various liquid investments. This can be achieved through bond interest, interest from diverse investments, and dividends, which are distributions of a company's earnings to shareholders. Typically, dividends are evaluated based on their dividend yield, calculated as a percentage of the current stock price. Research indicates that dividends play a substantial role in long-term returns, sometimes exceeding one-third of the total returns. An example of a company in this context is Greenbrier Companies, headquartered in Lake Oswego.

news.headline: Master class on organizing narrative & breaking news stories with award-winning journalists on Aug 16 in Washington.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, in Washington D.C., an event is set to take place featuring four journalists discussing effective story structuring. This event aims to provide guidance on managing reporting notes, quotes, and data, which can often be daunting for reporters. As stories typically consist of a beginning, middle, and end, journalists are faced with the challenge of choosing the most suitable structure for their pieces. This discussion will shed light on the various options available to journalists in shaping their narratives.

news.headline: Constellation Brands (NYSE: STZ) expected to report Q1 2025 earnings of $3.46/share on $2.7B revenues, with top and bottom-line growth anticipated. Brand portfolio and premiumization efforts driving performance.
news.summary: Constellation Brands, Inc. (NYSE: STZ) is set to report their first-quarter fiscal 2025 results on July 3, 2024. Analysts expect the company to show growth in both revenue and earnings. The Zacks Consensus Estimate for earnings is $3.46 per share, an 18.9% increase from the previous year. Revenue is estimated at $2.7 billion, a 6.3% rise from the same period last year. In the last reported quarter, the company delivered a 7.6% earnings surprise. Constellation Brands' success is attributed to their strong brand portfolio, premiumization efforts, and growth in beer sales, particularly with Modelo Especial and Corona Extra brands. The company's high-end Power Brands in the Wine & Spirits segment, like The Prisoner Brand Family and Kim Crawford, have been key growth drivers.

news.headline: CMS Energy's subsidiary partners with Jupiter Power to build 100MW battery storage in Michigan, moving towards net-zero carbon goal by 2040.Plans to spend $3.4 billion on clean energy between 2024-2028, including energy storage, making up 20% of capital expenditure.
news.summary: CMS Energy Corp.'s subsidiary, Consumers Energy, partners with Jupiter Power to construct 100 Megawatts of battery energy storage projects in Michigan, aligning with its net-zero carbon emission goal by 2040. This move responds to the US demand for clean electricity, reflecting the shift from fossil fuels to renewables. CMS Energy plans to invest $3.4 billion in clean energy from 2024-2028, including energy storage, comprising 20% of its overall five-year capital spending. This initiative reflects the company's commitment to expanding utility-scale renewable energy and energy storage capabilities.

news.headline: Airspan secures up to $95 million in new equity financing, and wipes out all existing funded debt with successful confirmation.
news.summary: Airspan Networks Holdings Inc., a company specializing in innovative software and hardware for 5G networks and a leader in Open RAN and private network solutions, revealed that the United States Bankruptcy Court for the District of Delaware approved its Plan of Reorganization. University of Phoenix study examines invisible labor of working moms. White paper highlights findings from 2023 M.O.M. report.
news.summary: University of Phoenix College of Doctoral Studies has published a new white paper called “Invisible Labor: An Analysis of Moms’ Perceptions in the Workplace” by Joy Taylor, Ed.D., an associate faculty member at the College. Taylor is also a senior research fellow at the Center for Workplace Diversity and Inclusion Research (CWDIR). The paper delves into insights from the 2023 Mothers Overcome More™ or M.O.M.™ report regarding the hidden work undertaken by employed mothers.

news.headline: Voxtur's annual meeting had overwhelming support for elected management nominees, approving resolutions and appointing MNP LLP as Auditor.
news.summary: Voxtur Analytics Corp., a technology company based in Toronto and Tampa, announced the outcomes of its recent annual and special meeting of shareholders held on June 28, 2024. During the meeting, all proposals put forth by the company were approved by the shareholders. This included setting the number of directors at four, electing the nominated directors, appointing MNP LLP as the company's Auditor, and ratifying the Long-Term Incentive Plan. Voxtur is listed on the TSXV under the tickers VXTR and VXTRF on the OTCQB.

news.headline: GRM Information Management introduces new ROI service with mobile app for enhanced patient experience.
news.summary: In Jersey City, New Jersey, GRM has introduced a revolutionary ROI service that enhances the patient experience through advanced mobile app features. This innovation allows for effortless self-service and access to support from agents, making the process smoother for users.

news.headline: Foreigners are seeking practical smart technology at the 2024 World Intelligence Expo in Beijing. Robots with human-like features and a flying car with 160 kg payload capacity are some attractions. Smart wheelchair controlled by "mind" also showcased.
news.summary: In Beijing on June 28, 2024, revolutionary developments were unveiled: bionic robots capable of bilingual communication in Chinese and English resembling humans with lifelike skin and nails. Additionally, a cutting-edge flying car operated by wind energy was revealed, boasting a high payload capacity of up to 160 kg. Another remarkable innovation introduced was a smart wheelchair that can be controlled using thoughts alone. These advancements mark major strides in technology and were showcased by Kevin and a team of experts.

news.headline: U-Haul offers free propane refills and safety checks for Fourth of July barbecues at their facilities.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, in Phoenix, U-Haul® is ensuring a smooth Fourth of July barbecue experience for all. To help with this, individuals can get their grills fueled up with propane from their local U-Haul facility. Certified technicians at these facilities will be offering complimentary inspections to make sure everything is in top shape for the celebration.

news.headline: Calls for replacing Joe Biden in 2024 election due to concerns about his age. Possible replacements include Hillary Clinton, Michelle Obama, and Gavin Newsom. Biden's campaign states he does not plan on dropping out. Trump named the winner of first debate. Democratic National Convention scheduled for August 19.
news.summary: The first 2024 presidential debate showcased Joe Biden and Donald Trump, with Trump named the winner in a poll. Biden struggled to convey his points clearly during the 90-minute event. There have been growing concerns about Biden's age, leading to calls for a potential replacement. Names like Hillary Clinton, Michelle Obama, and Gavin Newsom have surfaced as possible alternatives. Biden, having won pledged delegates in the 2024 election, shows no intention of dropping out. The Democratic National Committee's convention begins on August 19, as the question arises about who could potentially replace Biden to face Trump in the upcoming election in less than five months. Total number of engagements and replacements discussed with significant concerns over Biden's performance, leading up to the 2024 presidential election, creating speculations and uncertainties in the Democratic Party.

news.headline: BTG Pactual acquires M.Y. Safra Bank in the US. Transaction for 100% stake subject to approvals. Largest LatAm bank involved.
news.summary: The acquisition of 100% of the share capital of M.Y. Safra Bank by BTG Pactual ("BPAC11"), the largest investment bank in Latin America, was announced on June 27th, 2024 in São Paulo. The transaction is subject to regulatory approvals and other closing conditions.

news.headline: BigBear.ai chosen to demonstrate AI orchestration at DoD’s T-REX-24-2 event in August; vital for testing military tech.
news.summary: BigBear.ai, a prominent player in AI-driven defense and enterprise intelligence solutions, has received an invitation to showcase their AI orchestration abilities at the upcoming Department of Defense’s (DoD) RDER Technology Readiness Experimentation 2024 event. Scheduled for August, this exclusive event, known as T-REX-24-2, is a crucial live-fire demonstration and evaluation event aimed at testing advanced military technologies. The event offers a full-scale platform to assess capabilities, and BigBear.ai's involvement underscores their position as a key participant in this field.

news.headline: Pixelverse set to launch its game 'PixelTap' on TON, as Telegram's top games are migrating to the Open Network.
news.summary: Pixelverse, a popular Telegram game, is set to launch on the Open Network chain, joining numerous other top games. This move signifies the network's growing appeal to developers, with a majority of top Telegram games now being drawn to it. This development highlights the increasing adoption of the Open Network, which has seen a significant rise in users and developers. The addition of Pixelverse further boosts the network's gaming ecosystem, making it a prominent player in the gaming industry.

The company, listed as Nasdaq: RMCF, specializes in premium chocolates and confectionery items like gourmet caramel apples. This strategic move aims to enhance the governance structure of RMCF.
